2144500.name: Love n War: Warlord by Chance II
2144500.description:
As you have secured a throne for yourself and become the emperor of a vast empire, you now need to learn how to rule. Face new challenges, new foes, and of course new interesting personalities. Once again, sharpen your leadership ability and lead your nation to prosperity.

Building a Dynasty:
Love n War: Warlord by Chance II continues to improve and surpass its predecessors.
Many beautiful heroes with different personalities, purposes, and desires
Resource management & upgrades

Game Features:
Japanese voice-over for all the ladies
Many intense and strategic battles to fight
Newly reworked units' arts and animations
Deployable heroes on the battlefield
Richer and Deeper Story than Warlord by Chance with twist & turn
